{% extends "base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% block title %}{% translate "Docker Deployment" %}{% endblock %} {% block breadcrumb %}
  • {% translate "Documentation" %}
  • {% translate "Docker Deployment" %}
    • {% endblock %} {% block content %}
    {% translate "On This Page" %}
    • {% translate "Overview" %}
    • {% translate "Files Created" %}
    • {% translate "Environment Variables" %}
    • {% translate "Build and Run" %}
    • {% translate "Troubleshooting" %}

    {% translate "Docker Deployment" %}

    {% translate "Deploy this template using Docker and Docker Compose." %}

    {% translate "PythonAnywhere vs Docker:" %} {% translate "Use PythonAnywhere for simpler hosting with built-in management. Use Docker for more control or deploying on your own infrastructure." %}
    {% translate "Back to PythonAnywhere Deployment" %}

    {% translate "Overview" %}

    {% translate "This template includes Docker configuration for production deployment using:" %}

    • Gunicorn - WSGI application server
    • WhiteNoise - Static file serving
    • SQLite - Database (persisted via volume mount)

    {% translate "Files Created" %}

    {% translate "File" %} {% translate "Purpose" %}
    Dockerfile.prod {% translate "Production Docker image with Gunicorn" %}
    docker-compose.prod.yml {% translate "Production compose configuration" %}
    requirements/docker_prod.txt {% translate "Production dependencies (base + gunicorn + whitenoise)" %}
    src/wsgi.py {% translate "WSGI application entry point" %}
    src/settings/docker_prod.py {% translate "Docker production settings (WhiteNoise, BASE_DIR/var)" %}
    scripts/entrypoint.sh {% translate "Container startup script (collectstatic + gunicorn)" %}

    {% translate "Environment Variables" %}

    {% translate "Add these to your" %} .env {% translate "file:" %}

    PROJECT_SLUG=your_project_slug
PROJECT_NAME=Your Project Name
PROJECT_DESCRIPTION=Project description
PROJECT_DOMAIN=example.com
DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=your-secret-key-here
DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS=example.com,www.example.com
PROJECT_PORT_PROD=8000
    {% translate "Note:" %} {% translate "The" %} PROJECT_PORT_PROD {% translate "defaults to 8000. Set this in your" %} .env {% translate "or change the default in" %} docker-compose.prod.yml.

    {% translate "Build and Run" %}

    1. {% translate "Build the image" %}

    docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml build

    2. {% translate "Run the container" %}

    docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d

    3. {% translate "View logs" %}

    docker logs -f bestdjangotemplate-prod

    4. {% translate "Stop the container" %}

    docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml down

    {% translate "Troubleshooting" %}

    {% translate "Static files are served by WhiteNoise. Ensure:" %}

    • {% translate "collectstatic has run (check entrypoint.sh logs)" %}
    • {% translate "STATIC_ROOT is set correctly in docker_prod.py" %}
    • {% translate "Files exist in ./var/static/" %}

    {% translate "The container runs as appuser. Ensure files in ./var/ are writable:" %}

    chmod -R 777 var/
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml restart

    {% translate "SQLite persists via volume mount (.:/app). If data is lost:" %}

    • {% translate "Verify volume mount is active:" %} docker inspect <container> | grep -A Mounts
    • {% translate "Check database exists on host:" %} ls -la *.sqlite3

    {% translate "Build-time variables (PROJECT_SLUG, DJANGO_SECRET_KEY, etc.) must be passed via:" %}

    docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml build --build-arg DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=your-key

    {% translate "Or ensure they are in your .env file before building." %}

    {% translate "Quick Reference" %}

    {% translate "Item" %} {% translate "Value" %}
    {% translate "Default port" %} 8000
    {% translate "Internal port" %} 8000
    {% translate "Container name" %} <PROJECT_SLUG>-prod
    {% translate "Static files" %} ./var/static/
    {% translate "Database" %} ./<PROJECT_SLUG>.sqlite3
    {% endblock %}
